items.title: Detailed Quiz Analytics
items.description: SmartWinnr provides detailed real-time quiz analytics which will help you in getting a clear insight into the performance of the participants in the quizzes.

items.title: Form Analytics
items.description: Follow the below steps to view Form analytics.

items.title: How can I download Attempt-wise User Objective Report?
items.description: This report provides objective-level performance data for each attempt.

items.title: How can I track improvement?
items.description: The Quiz Analytics Dashboard provides a comprehensive view of quiz performance, learner participation, and engagement across your organization.

items.title: How can I track improvement?
items.description: The SmartPath Dashboard provides a complete view of learner engagement and progress across your learning journeys.

items.title: How can I view KHub Analytics?
items.description: Only the users who have an editor role can view KHub analytics

items.title: How do I download Attempt-wise Coaching Report?
items.description: This report shows all attempts for a specific coaching.

items.title: How do I download Coaching-wise Report?
items.description: This report focuses on one specific coaching.

items.title: How do I download Overall Coaching Report?
items.description: This report summarizes all coaching activities across all users.

items.title: How do I track improvement?
items.description: The AI Coaching Dashboard gives you a complete view of how your team is performing in AI roleplay practice.

items.title: How do I track improvements for multiple role-plays at the same time?
items.description: You can track improvement across multiple roleplays simultaneously by using the Filters feature on the Coaching Dashboard.

items.title: How do I view submissions as they happen?
items.description: This feature allows editors, trainers, and admins to view video coaching submissions from users in real time.

items.title: How Editors evaluate Long Answer Questions?
items.description: Evaluation is a systematic process of analyzing the user responses to determine the correctness of the response.

items.title: How to evaluate the Assignment submitted in SmartPath?
items.description: Editor can effectively monitor the assignment submission and supports timely reviews, which ensures accurate tracking of learner progress and performance.

items.title: How to view SmartFeed Analytics?
items.description: SmartFeed Analytics provides insights into the number of views for each SmartFeed created by you, as well as for SmartFeeds to which you have access.

items.title: How to view the SmartPath Analytics.
items.description: You can view detailed analytics for any SmartPath to understand learner engagement, progress, and performance.

items.title: Learner Overall Report
items.description: An Editor who has access to the Learner Report can see the Report Analytics.

items.description: An Editor who has access to the Learner Report can see the Report Analytics.

items.description: The Quiz Comparison Report provides a comparative view of multiple quizzes created in SmartWinnr.

items.title: Quiz Wise Analytics
items.description: SmartWinnr provides a very detailed set of analytics on every quiz that you have created and assigned to people.

items.title: Reports & Analytics
items.description: Learning reports, admin reports, and analytics dashboards.

items.title: Survey Analytics
items.description: Survey Analytics allows you to monitor and analyze responses collected from your surveys.

items.title: Team Analytics
items.description: The results of the performance of all quizzes are available to all the quizmasters in the ‘Team Analytics’ section.
